statement: Reusable interaction feedback & motion system — The app needs one reusable interaction-feedback system so visual quality is consistent and motion never owns business state. — Modular, reusable effects for: valid drop-target highlight, invalid-drop feedback, parent-container glow, selected-card highlight, newly-created-item highlight, focus highlight, collapsed-container expansion animation, drag feedback, save/sync feedback, locked/disabled feedback. Effects must be modular, not hardcoded per card/island. Motion must never own business state or block save/load.
affected_modules: shared motion/feedback utilities; src/styles/tokens.ts; card/island consumers
